Status.XLATE_Description: L1CA/E1/B1 code used for absolute and DGNSS position computation
L1P code used for absolute and DGNSS position computation
L2P code used for absolute and DGNSS position computation
Ionosphere-free combination used for absolute position computation
Measurements unavailable
Ephemeris unavailable
Unhealthy SV
Time-Frequency parameters from the ephemeris data set may be wrong
Initial conditions (position and velocity vectors) from the ephemeris data set may be wrong
Almanac SV health indicator unavailable
Unhealthy SV
Alert flag is set
URA indicates the absence of accuracy prediction
User excluded this SV from position computation
User excluded this SV with this frequency channel number from position computation
This SV is excluded from solution because its system number is unknown
This SV has an elevation lower than the specified mask angle
Unable to compute position with the given ephemeris data
Ephemeris data is too old
This SV does not belong to the constellation the user has selected
This SV is not used in DGNSS processing
DGNSS corrections are not available for this satellite, but its measurements are used in positioning, along with DGNSS-corrected measurements from other satellites
RAIM has detected wrong measurements
SNR below specified minimum level
This SV is not used in DION Local mode
DLL not settled
Ionospheric corrections are not received from reference station
Coarse code outlier (hundreds of meters or more) has been detected
Ephemeris index unavailable (no ephemeris information)
This SV is not used in RTK processing
This SV is excluded from RTK processing because a wrong combination of measurements has been detected
This satellite is excluded from OmniSTAR XP/HP or TopNET Global-D PPP position computation
This satellite is used for TopNET Global-C PPP position computation
L1CA/E1/B1 and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1P and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L2P and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1P, L2P and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1CA/E1/B1, L2P and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L2C and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1P, L2C and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1CA/E1/B1, L2C and L5/L3/B3 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1CA/E1/B1 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1P measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L2P measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1P and L2P measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1CA and L2P measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
This satellite is used for OmniSTAR XP/HP or TopNET Global-D PPP position computation
L2C measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1P and L2C measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
L1CA/B1 and L2C/B2 measurements are used in RTK processing and DGNSS solution
SBAS data are used to augment positioning engines of the rover receiver
This SV is used only for extrapolating RTK and DGNSS solutions
Satellite navigation status is undefined
